sections.importNmapHint: Import a Nmap XML or connect a scanner to start building the visual map.
sections.blueTeamDescription: The Blue Team module will correlate assets, services, CVEs, criticality, and remediation recommendations.
sections.redTeamDescription: Attack paths will be theoretical or require human approval, authorized scope, and audit trail.
sections.defineProviders: Define AI providers, agents, MCP, connectors, language, theme and dashboard background.

settings.title: CyberMap Configuration
settings.description: Configure appearance, language, AI, agents, MCP, connectors and security policies from a single control center.

sections.appearanceDesc: Configure visual theme and dashboard background. In this phase persistence is local.
sections.languageDesc: Language selector. The interface updates when you change it.
sections.aiProvidersDesc: Define provider, model, reasoning mode and generation parameters. Real API keys should not be saved in frontend.
sections.agentsDesc: Configure agents for automation. Execution in sandbox with security validation.
sections.mcpDesc: MCP servers for extensibility. Executed tools require validation.
sections.connectorsDesc: Configure external data sources. Real secrets are not saved and synchronization is not executed from frontend.
sections.securityDesc: Human approval policies, sandbox and audit trail.

exploration.title: Exploration
exploration.pageDesc: Module to load and visualize assets and findings. This version uses temporary JSON storage on the backend.

sections.noRuns: No AI executions yet. Run an analysis to create the first audit record.
